category_sources: Official GitHub README says nesC is an extension to C for TinyOS sensor network nodes.
source_facts.description says it is a programming language for deeply networked systems.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is nesC.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides install and usage notes and says to reference man nescc.
Official repository contains a doc directory for project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tinyos/nesc; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes nesC as a C extension for TinyOS sensor network nodes.
source_facts.description identifies a programming language for networked systems.
